maxReplicas.description: Maximum number of replicas to scale up to.

minReplicas.description: Minimum number of replicas to maintain.

targetCPUUtilizationPercentage.description: Target average CPU utilization (percentage). Set to null to disable.

targetMemoryUtilizationPercentage.description: Target average memory utilization (percentage). Set to null to disable.

oauthTokenUrl.description: OAuth token endpoint used for internal authentication (sets VITE_OAUTH_TOKEN_URL).

polarisApiUrl.description: Base URL of the Polaris API server (sets VITE_POLARIS_API_URL).

polarisRealmHeaderName.description: HTTP header used to convey the realm to the Polaris server (sets VITE_POLARIS_REALM_HEADER_NAME).

issuerUrl.description: OIDC issuer URL (sets VITE_OIDC_ISSUER_URL). Leave empty to disable OIDC.

configMapLabels.description: Additional labels to apply to the console configmap.

containerLifecycle.description: Lifecycle hooks for the console container. See [Container Lifecycle Hooks](https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/containers/container-lifecycle-hooks/).

containerSecurityContext.description: Security context for the console container. Defaults harden the container per Kubernetes Pod Security Standards "restricted" profile.

deploymentAnnotations.description: Additional annotations to apply to the console deployment.

envFrom.description: envFrom sources beyond the chart-managed ConfigMap. Each item must be a valid Kubernetes [EnvFromSource](https://kubernetes.io/docs/reference/generated/kubernetes-api/v1.29/#envfromsource-v1-core). Templated against the global context.

extraEnv.description: Additional environment variables to add to the console container. Each item must be a valid Kubernetes [EnvVar](https://kubernetes.io/docs/reference/generated/kubernetes-api/v1.29/#envvar-v1-core). Templated against the global context.

extraInitContainers.description: Additional init containers for the console pod.

extraVolumeMounts.description: Additional volume mounts to attach to the console container.

extraVolumes.description: Additional volumes to attach to the pod.

fullnameOverride.description: Override the fully qualified application name. By default the release name is combined with the chart name.

annotations.description: Annotations to apply to the Gateway.

enabled.description: Whether to create a Gateway API Gateway. Requires `httproute.enabled: true`.

hostUsers.description: Specifies whether a pod should use the host's user namespace. See [User Namespaces](https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/workloads/pods/user-namespaces/).

annotations.description: Annotations to apply to the HTTPRoute.

enabled.description: Whether to create a Gateway API HTTPRoute. Mutually exclusive with `ingress.enabled`.

gatewayName.description: Name of the parent Gateway resource.

gatewayNamespace.description: Namespace of the parent Gateway resource.

sectionName.description: Optional listener section name within the parent Gateway.

repository.description: The image repository to pull from.

tag.description: The image tag. If empty, defaults to the chart's appVersion.

imagePullSecrets.description: References to secrets in the same namespace to use for pulling any of the images used by this chart. Each entry is a string referring to an existing secret in the namespace.

annotations.description: Annotations to apply to the Ingress.

className.description: Ingress class name. Leave empty to use the cluster default.

enabled.description: Whether to create an Ingress resource. Mutually exclusive with `httproute.enabled`.

hosts.description: Hostnames and paths the Ingress will route.

tls.description: TLS configuration. Each entry must define `secretName` and `hosts`.

failureThreshold.description: Minimum consecutive failures for the probe to be considered failed.

initialDelaySeconds.description: Number of seconds after the container has started before liveness probes are initiated.

periodSeconds.description: How often (in seconds) to perform the probe.

successThreshold.description: Minimum consecutive successes for the probe to be considered successful after having failed.

terminationGracePeriodSeconds.description: Optional duration in seconds the pod needs to terminate gracefully upon probe failure.

timeoutSeconds.description: Number of seconds after which the probe times out.

nameOverride.description: Override the chart name. By default the chart's name is used as the name of all resources.

podAnnotations.description: Annotations to apply to console pods.

annotations.description: Annotations to add to the pod disruption budget.

enabled.description: Specifies whether a pod disruption budget should be created.

maxUnavailable.description: The maximum number of pods that can be unavailable during disruptions. IMPORTANT: Cannot be used simultaneously with minAvailable.

minAvailable.description: The minimum number of pods that should remain available during disruptions. IMPORTANT: Cannot be used simultaneously with maxUnavailable.

podLabels.description: Additional labels to apply to console pods.

podSecurityContext.description: Security context for the console pod. See [Security Context](https://kubernetes.io/docs/tasks/configure-pod-container/security-context/). Defaults match the `apache/polaris-console` image (GID 10001).

priorityClassName.description: Priority class name for the pods.

failureThreshold.description: Minimum consecutive failures for the probe to be considered failed.

initialDelaySeconds.description: Number of seconds after the container has started before readiness probes are initiated.

periodSeconds.description: How often (in seconds) to perform the probe.

successThreshold.description: Minimum consecutive successes for the probe to be considered successful after having failed.

timeoutSeconds.description: Number of seconds after which the probe times out.

replicaCount.description: The number of replicas to deploy (horizontal scaling).

resources.description: Compute resource requests and limits for the console container.

revisionHistoryLimit.description: The number of old ReplicaSets to retain to allow rollback. Defaults to the Kubernetes default (10) when null.

annotations.description: Annotations to add to the service.

clusterIP.description: Cluster IP override. Set to "None" for a headless service.

externalTrafficPolicy.description: Controls how traffic from external sources is routed (NodePort/LoadBalancer only).

internalTrafficPolicy.description: Controls how traffic from internal sources is routed.

name.description: The name of the service port. Must match a container port name when used by ingress/HTTPRoute by name.

nodePort.description: The port on each node on which this service is exposed when type is NodePort or LoadBalancer. Allocated by the system when null.

port.description: The port the service listens on.

protocol.description: The IP protocol for the port.

targetPort.description: Number of the port to access on the pods targeted by the service. Defaults to `port` when null.

trafficDistribution.description: Traffic distribution preference. Only valid value: PreferClose. Requires Kubernetes >= 1.31.

type.description: The type of service to create.

annotations.description: Annotations to add to the service account.

create.description: Specifies whether a service account should be created.

name.description: The name of the service account to use. If not set and create is true, a name is generated using the fullname template.

terminationGracePeriodSeconds.description: Duration in seconds the pod needs to terminate gracefully. Must be greater than the preStop hook duration.

topologySpreadConstraints.description: Topology spread constraints for the pods.
